title: . Creation of National Wages and Productivity Commission. There is hereby created a National
content:
. Creation of National Wages and Productivity Commission. There is hereby created a National 
Wages and Productivity Commission, hereinafter referred to as the Commission, which shall be attached to 
the Department of Labor and Employment (DOLE) for policy and program coordination. (As amended by 
Republic Act No. 6727, June 9, 1989).
